prompt:
A modern digital portrait depicting a young man. Using the submitted reference image strictly for facial identity, it preserves the exact facial features, precise facial structure, and natural realism of the person. The subject has a cheerful, confident smile and wears stylish glasses, shown in multiple poses.
The central portrait is large, sharp, and highly detailed, illuminated with warm, soft lighting that enhances the facial contours and skin tone. In the background, a semi-transparent profile of the same person blends smoothly into an abstract composition of expressive red brushstrokes.
In the foreground, two smaller versions of the man are included: one standing in casual clothing with a confident posture, and another seated with legs crossed in a thoughtful, pensive pose. The outfits are youthful and casual, featuring light-colored shirts and jeans.
The background combines clean white space with textured elements and bold red brushstrokes, creating a striking and artistic contrast. The overall composition follows a modern poster-style aesthetic, with subtle glow effects, smooth transitions, and a polished, high-end digital art finish.
